failure_reason: Wired existing real BMF dialects into the runtime capability registry as recipe capsules. Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, natural language, image, audio, video, and document dialects register dynamically, parse source-object requests into Form BMF objects, and reverse Python/image objects back to source objects through the same capsule contract in source and binary modes.
